message:
feat(stdlib): integrate observation mode and fast-path fields into receipt pipeline, fix fromCharCode UTF-16 handling

Build on the StringFastPathEligibility types from the previous commit by
wiring them through the actual receipt construction pipeline:

String.fromCharCode fix:
- Replace char::from_u32 scalar-by-scalar construction with proper
  UTF-16 code unit collection and utf16_materialize(), fixing incorrect
  handling of surrogate pairs in fromCharCode arguments

build_string_representation_receipt:
- Populate observation_mode based on actual non-BMP scalar detection
  (BoundarySensitiveUtf16 when either source or result has non-BMP)
- Populate view_eligible based on SliceView kind + no flatten + non-empty
- Populate stable_hash in the receipt for cache key stability
- Use result_utf16_units instead of result_char_len for flatten_required
  check (code unit length is the correct metric for memory cost)

classify_string_representation:
- Switch classification thresholds from char counts to UTF-16 code unit
  counts for correct memory-size-based representation selection
- Remove premature Inline return based on char count (now handled by
  UTF-16 unit comparison against STRING_INLINE_CHAR_MAX)

Receipt hash:
- Include kind, observation_mode, and view_eligible in the digest
  computation for full round-trip stability

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
